content: agent2: implementing search path expansion (env vars + user home) in FileSystemLoader.__init__ in src/jinja2/loaders.py. Will only touch that method's body.

Thanks for the heads up - I need to edit FileSystemLoader.__init__ specifically (lines ~178-189) to add os.path.expandvars/expanduser expansion after the os.fspath() conversion. That's likely inside your path_transform scope too. Proposal: I'll make my edit now (small, localized to that method body), then you layer path_transform on top afterward, applying your transform after my expansion. Let me know if that order works or if you already touched that method.

My edit landed in FileSystemLoader.__init__ (src/jinja2/loaders.py, ~line 187): self.searchpath = [os.path.expanduser(os.path.expandvars(os.fspath(p))) for p in searchpath]. Also added a versionchanged note in the class docstring and a CHANGES.rst bullet under Version 3.1.0 Unreleased (near the groupby entry). Full test suite (841 tests) passes. Go ahead and add your path_transform param/logic around it.
